---
title: "Publications & Reports"
toc: false
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
.pub-card {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;
}
.pub-card:hover {
  border-color: #aaa;
  background: #fafafa;
}
.pub-type {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #888;
  margin: 0 0 6px;
}
.pub-title {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111;
  margin: 0 0 6px;
}
.pub-authors {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #555;
  margin: 0 0 4px;
}
.pub-authors strong {
  color: #111;
}
.pub-venue {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #888;
  font-style: italic;
  margin: 0 0 12px;
}
.pub-description {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #444;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
}
.pub-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}
.pub-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 5px 12px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
}
.pub-link:hover {
  background: #f0f0f0;
  border-color: #999;
}
.pub-link.primary {
  background: #111;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #111;
}
.pub-link.primary:hover {
  background: #333;
  border-color: #333;
}
</style>

<!-- ── Journal Article ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="pub-card">
  <p class="pub-type">Journal Article</p>
  <p class="pub-title">Stress, Cognitive Load, and Specifications Grading in an Engineering Laboratory Course</p>
  <p class="pub-authors">
    Cleo McHenry, Sara Morishige, Jasmine Sampat, <strong>Joaquin Gonzalez-Salgado</strong>, Leah Uriarte, Matthew Spencer
  </p>
  <p class="pub-venue">IEEE Transactions on Education, 2025</p>
  <p class="pub-description">
    This paper presents a controlled two-year experiment at Harvey Mudd College studying how two evidence-based
    interventions — simplified lab manuals and specifications grading — affected student stress and cognitive load
    in a required sophomore engineering lab course (E80). Weekly validated surveys showed that stress was
    significantly reduced in six of seven labs, and cognitive load dropped significantly in three. Students in
    the treatment cohort also posted meaningfully higher scores on a summative technical memo, suggesting the
    interventions did not harm learning. I contributed as a co-author on the study design, data collection,
    and analysis.
  </p>
  <div class="pub-links">
    <a class="pub-link primary" href="" target="_blank">Read Paper (PDF)</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Final Report ───────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="pub-card">
  <p class="pub-type">Report</p>
  <p class="pub-title">Autonomous Surface &amp; Dive Robot for Underwater Depth Mapping</p>
  <p class="pub-authors">
    <strong>Joaquin Gonzalez-Salgado</strong>, Esteban Gonzalez, Ayla Greenstein, Kathy Guo
  </p>
  <p class="pub-venue">E80: Experimental Engineering, Harvey Mudd College — Spring 2026</p>
  <p class="pub-description">
    This report documents the design, construction, and field deployment of an autonomous underwater vehicle
    (AUV) built to map the seafloor topography of Dana Point Harbor. The vehicle integrated a SONAR depth
    sensor (CME1538-100LB microphone + daex25W-8 speaker), an MPX5700ASX pressure sensor for dive depth,
    and a thermistor for temperature profiling across depth. The AUV featured four horizontal and two vertical
    thrusters, a low center of gravity for surface stability, and a winch-based recovery system. Deployment
    at Dana Point produced a topographic depth map of the harbor floor, with real-time data logging to an
    onboard SD card. Sensor drift from ocean currents affected positional accuracy, motivating future work
    on closed-loop horizontal control.
  </p>
  <div class="pub-links">
    <a class="pub-link primary" href="images/e80Poster.pdf" target="_blank">View Poster (PDF)</a>
    <a class="pub-link" href="projects.html#auv-ocean-floor-sonar-mapping">See Project Page</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Work in Progress ───────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="pub-card">
  <p class="pub-type" style="color: #b07800;">Work in Progress</p>
  <p class="pub-title">Low-Noise Analog Amplifier for Electropenetrography and R/EMF Signal Acquisition</p>
  <p class="pub-authors">
    <strong>Joaquin Gonzalez-Salgado</strong>, Matthew Spencer — ACE Lab, Harvey Mudd College
  </p>
  <p class="pub-venue">In preparation — Analog Circuitry Engineering (ACE) Lab, USDA Collaboration</p>
  <p class="pub-description">
    Ongoing manuscript documenting the design and characterization of a low-noise analog amplifier
    for monitoring insect feeding behavior via electropenetrography (EPG) and resistive/emf (R/EMF)
    signal acquisition.
  </p>
  <div class="pub-links">
    <span style="font-size: 0.82rem; color: #999; font-style: italic; padding: 5px 2px;">
      Manuscript in preparation
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```
